LightningComponentBundle.description: Polls for field updates on an Opportunity and automatically proceeds to the next screen when fields are populated.

property.name: recordId
property.label: Opportunity Record Id
property.description: The Id of the Opportunity record to monitor

property.name: fieldsToCheck
property.label: Fields To Check (comma-separated)
property.description: Comma-separated list of field API names to check (e.g., AI_Response__c,AI_Status__c)

property.name: pollIntervalSeconds
property.label: Poll Interval (seconds)
property.description: How often to check for updates (default: 5 seconds)

property.name: maxWaitTimeSeconds
property.label: Max Wait Time (seconds)
property.description: Maximum time to wait before proceeding (default: 30 seconds)

property.name: successMessage
property.label: Success Message
property.description: Message to display when fields are populated
